title: Daylight v20 Independent Rebuild Receipt
description: Documentation schema for one external rebuild receipt inside an external evidence bundle. The enforced validator is src/external_evidence.py. A receipt is rejected if the builder identity contains a reserved token (self, internal, local, repo, repository, harness, fixture, fixtures, unknown, wuci, noxframe), the independence class is not 'external', it is fixture or not claim-usable, any subject binding differs, fewer than two receipts exist, two receipts share a builder identity or environment digest, or its pinned attestation is missing or inadmissible. The attestation subject_digest must equal SHA-256('DAYLIGHT-v20-EXTERNAL-REBUILD-RECEIPT:' + canonical(receipt without attestation_ref)).
